queries: E2E pipeline Feature Engineering for Machine Learning recent authoritative sources
action.query: E2E pipeline Feature Engineering for Machine Learning recent authoritative sources

annotations.title: How to streamline feature engineering for machine learning | TechTarget
The Machine Learning Pipeline - Feature Engineering for Machine Learning [Book]
Pipelines in machine learning - Feature Engineering Made Easy [Book]
Feature Engineering: What Powers Machine Learning – Alteryx | Innovation
Tips for Effective Feature Engineering in Machine Learning - MachineLearningMastery.com
Feature Engineering in Machine Learning 2026 - Techoc Blog
Enhance Productivity with Auto Feature Engineering Workflow
A Beginner’s Guide for Feature Engineering in Machine Learning

content.text:
Feature engineering is a pivotal step in the machine learning pipeline, involving the transformation of raw data into meaningful features that enhance model performance. In end-to-end (E2E) machine learning pipelines, effective feature engineering is crucial for building robust and accurate models. Here are several authoritative and recent sources that delve into this topic:

1. **"How to Streamline Feature Engineering for Machine Learning" by George Lawton**  
   This article discusses strategies to improve the efficiency of feature engineering, emphasizing the importance of clean, structured data and the role of domain expertise in selecting relevant features. ([techtarget.com](https://www.techtarget.com/searchdatamanagement/feature/How-to-streamline-feature-engineering-for-machine-learning?utm_source=openai))

2. **"Feature Engineering for Machine Learning" by Alice Zheng and Amanda Casari**  
   This book provides an in-depth exploration of feature engineering techniques, including data transformations, feature scaling, and the creation of interaction features, all within the context of the machine learning pipeline. ([oreilly.com](https://www.oreilly.com/library/view/feature-engineering-for/9781491953235/ch01.html?utm_source=openai))

3. **"Pipelines in Machine Learning - Feature Engineering Made Easy" by Sinan Ozdemir, Divya Susarla, and Michael Smith**  
   This resource offers practical guidance on constructing machine learning pipelines, focusing on the integration of feature engineering steps to streamline the modeling process. ([oreilly.com](https://www.oreilly.com/library/view/feature-engineering-made/9781787287600/881cd50b-2fbf-40de-8d18-c520dae323c5.xhtml?utm_source=openai))

4. **"Feature Engineering: What Powers Machine Learning" by Feature Labs**  
   This article outlines the process of extracting features from raw data, highlighting the significance of feature engineering in building effective machine learning models. ([innovation.alteryx.com](https://innovation.alteryx.com/feature-engineering-churn/?utm_source=openai))

5. **"Tips for Effective Feature Engineering in Machine Learning" by Jason Brownlee**  
   This guide provides practical tips on feature engineering, including techniques for handling missing data, encoding categorical variables, and scaling numerical features, all aimed at improving model performance. ([machinelearningmastery.com](https://machinelearningmastery.com/tips-for-effective-feature-engineering-in-machine-learning/?utm_source=openai))

6. **"Feature Engineering in Machine Learning 2026" by Techoc Blog**  
   This article discusses the evolving challenges in feature engineering, emphasizing the importance of understanding which features truly impact model performance in the current landscape. ([techoc.blog](https://techoc.blog/feature-engineering-in-machine-learning/?utm_source=openai))

7. **"Enhance Productivity with Auto Feature Engineering Workflow" by Chendi Xue and Jian Zhang**  
   This piece introduces an automated feature engineering workflow designed to streamline the process of transforming raw data into ready-to-train features, thereby improving productivity. ([intel.com](https://www.intel.com/content/www/us/en/developer/articles/technical/productivity-auto-feature-engineering-workflow.html?utm_source=openai))

8. **"A Beginner’s Guide for Feature Engineering in Machine Learning" by Tredence**  
   This guide offers a comprehensive introduction to feature engineering, including its importance, common techniques, and real-world examples across various industries. ([tredence.com](https://www.tredence.com/blog/feature-engineering-in-machine-learning?utm_source=openai))

These resources provide valuable insights into the role of feature engineering within end-to-end machine learning pipelines, offering both theoretical foundations and practical applications to enhance model development.
